title: cephalantheropsis longipes
intro: Cephalantheropsis longipes, also known as the narrow-lipped Helleborine, is a species of orchid native to East Asia. It is a type of terrestrial orchid with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. Cephalantheropsis longipes is often used in traditional herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects.
